chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1095 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos. 1 & 5 a/w reply as at A. 2. For hearing of main case. 05.12.2025. Ms. Saima Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioners through instant petition seeks following relief(s):- “a. To call respondents No.9 to 14 in person before this Court and direct them not to disturb personal life of the petitioners and not to cause any harassment against the petitioners and their near relatives, family members directly or indirectly. b. To direct respondents No.2 to 8 to provide legal protection to the petitioners so also near relatives, cousin and family members of the petitioners from the hands of respondents No.9 to 14 so that they could live a happy and meaningful life.” Learned AAG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioners by providing due protection to them. Counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the statement made by learned AAG. Order accordingly. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP concerned for compliance. JUDGE Nadir/PS
